Reported it to CEO @amix3k with video proof, but they ignored it, claiming a 2FA bypass is "not a risk." ​The Danger: Even with 2FA enabled, an attacker can fully access your account. Todoist’s refusal to fix this renders your security useless. ​I’ve published the PoC on YouTube to warn users since the company chose negligence over safety. Your data is NOT safe here.

Just a heads up for any neurodiverse users- this app ain't it. In just three days, this app: ✅ Created tasks I didn't ask for (loss of agency) ✅ Labeled them "overdue" (artificial shame/failure) ✅ Warned of a limit (scarcity anxiety) ✅ Showed a visual "0/5 tasks" (failure display) ✅ Instilled urgency about orientation tasks (absurd) I'm sure some nerotypicals need that sort of thing to be productive, but it's the opposite of accessible to the rest of us.
